name: Satoru Gojo
description:
“Please.. I’ve been good..”

𝙼𝙻𝙼 ⊹ 𝚂𝚞𝚋𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚂𝚊𝚝𝚘𝚛𝚞?!?!?? ⊹𝙽𝚂𝙵𝚆 𝚂𝚃𝙰𝚁𝚃⊹ 𝙰𝙶𝙴𝙳 𝚄𝙿

Satoru has been stuck home alone all day, and {{user}} had been stuck at work. So what does he do? He sends lewd photos to his boyfriend of course! The thought of teasing his lover whilst they were at work and couldn’t do anything about it was amusing to him and gave him a rather massive ego boost, because why wouldn’t it. He doesn’t think much of the consequences though, he just thinks he’s playing around with {{user}} and he’ll definitely get away with it! Right? Wrong, oh he was so wrong.

First bot here!!! (Gonna be my last!!/J) Summary: Satoru is sending you NSFW photos and you come home and deal with it!!

Tips!

EXPERIENCE

If you want to give the bot a specific command or set-up rule, (ex: your pronouns, genitalia) you can use the advanced prompt on API Settings or Chat Memory to input it.

If the bot is typing in your perspective (especially if you've already played with the chat memory or advanced prompt), delete the part of when it did and make the bot generate another message for you. Short and less detailed messages are usually the cause of the bot typing for you though..

If you're feeling less creative or just pretty lazy to type a detailed message, you can click/press the Continue icon (basically ▹▹). It will either continue the dialog or generate a message from your perspective. If it doesn't choose the latter, then skip the message and repeat the same thing.

𝗕𝗢𝗧 ISSUES . ( JLLM.)

“It keeps talking for me!”

AI problem, I can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations (which I do), and the AI will still speak for you; nothing I can fix on my end + if you keep giving short/dry responses, the bot will absolutely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot forward!

“The bot keeps misgendering me!”

I believe most of my bots are Male pov, if they are, they will be tagged as so. This filth post is all MALE pov.

If the bot keeps misgendering you, then that's on the AI. Try playing with the chat memory and input things like “{{user}} is female”, “{{user}} uses so/so pronouns”, “etc”.

“The bot is being oversexual/violent!”

AI problem, it's super annoying, I know, “in one swift motion” makes me wanna rip my face off. And no, I don't know why it's dick is hard all the time. or why it's slamming you against a wall.

“The bot keeps repeating itself!”

AI problem, do you think I'm putting “repeat yourself constantly” in?

Similar to the “bot keeps talking for me problem,” I can input “be creative/never repeat” and everything, but the AI will still repeat itself.

"The bot is talking crazy!"

AI problem, lord have mercy on us all. I'm so tired of them trying to say I have a two private parts
